mermaidSyntax:
sequenceDiagram
  participant A as Author
  participant E as Editor
  participant R1 as Reviewer 1
  participant R2 as Reviewer 2
  participant P as Production

  A->>E: Submit Manuscript
  E->>E: Desk Review

  alt Desk Reject
    E-->>A: Reject
  else Send to Peer Review
    par Parallel Review Assignment
      E->>R1: Assign Manuscript
      E->>R2: Assign Manuscript
    end
    R1-->>E: Review Report (2-4 weeks)
    R2-->>E: Review Report (2-4 weeks)

    alt Accept
      E-->>A: Accept Decision
    else Minor Revisions
      E-->>A: Minor Revisions Required
      A->>E: Resubmit Revised Manuscript
      Note over A,E: Review cycle repeats
    else Major Revisions
      E-->>A: Major Revisions Required
      A->>E: Resubmit Revised Manuscript
      Note over A,E: Review cycle repeats
    else Reject
      E-->>A: Reject Decision
    end
  end

  Note over E,P: Post-Acceptance Production
  E->>P: Final Manuscript
  P->>P: Copyediting & Typesetting
  P->>A: Send Proofs
  A->>P: Approve Proofs
  P->>P: Publish Article
